panel.title: Network Activity
settings.layout.label: Layout
settings.layout.desc: Arrange cells in a row (horizontal) or a 2×2 grid (vertical).
settings.slots.label: Cell Assignment
settings.slots.desc: Choose what each cell displays. No duplicates possible. E.g., use empty slots to only show icons.
settings.iconType.label: Icon Type
settings.iconType.desc: Choose the icon style used for the TX/RX indicators.
settings.byteThresholdActive.label: Activity Threshold
settings.byteThresholdActive.desc: Traffic below this value (B/s) is shown as inactive.
settings.fontSizeModifier.label: Font Size
settings.fontSizeModifier.desc: Scale the text size relative to the default.
settings.iconSizeModifier.label: Icon Size
settings.iconSizeModifier.desc: Scale the icon size relative to the default.
settings.useCustomFont.label: Custom Font
settings.useCustomFont.desc: Override the default font for speed values.
settings.customFontFamily.label: Font
settings.customFontFamily.desc: Choose a font for the speed values.
settings.customFontBold.label: Bold
settings.customFontItalic.label: Italic
settings.useCustomColors.label: Custom Colors
settings.useCustomColors.desc: Enable custom colors instead of theme defaults.
settings.colorTx.label: TX Active
settings.colorTx.desc: Upload icon color when above the threshold.
settings.colorRx.label: RX Active
settings.colorRx.desc: Download icon color when above the threshold.
settings.colorSilent.label: Inactive
settings.colorSilent.desc: Icon color when traffic is below the threshold.
settings.colorText.label: Text
settings.paddingLeft.label: Padding Left
settings.paddingLeft.desc: Padding of the content on the left.
settings.paddingRight.label: Padding Right
settings.paddingRight.desc: Padding of the content on the right.
settings.columnSpacing.label: Column Spacing
settings.columnSpacing.desc: Spacing between columns in grid layout.
settings.rowSpacing.label: Row Spacing
settings.rowSpacing.desc: Spacing between rows in grid layout (has no effect in horizontal layout).
